_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 9 currently banned, 5360 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: fail2ban total bans 5360 (up from 5262, +98). 9 IPs currently banned (up from 8). 7 currently failed. Brute-force continues at typical rate. Only authorized activity from novakj.

pdf_security.document_write_safe: 1 usage in keyboard-shortcuts.js line 395 — writes to newly opened blank window for print cheat sheet only. All content escaped via escapeHtml(). Acceptable pattern.
pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 124 usages across 36 JS files — all safe: static templates, clearing operations, escaped user data, numeric-only interpolation, blob URLs, hardcoded SVG, or escapeHtml() helper. New files command-palette.js (2 uses) and keyboard-shortcuts.js (5 uses) all properly escaped.

action_registry_js.feature: Central action registry for command palette and keyboard shortcuts. Stores actions with id/name/category/execute callback. Recent actions persisted via localStorage.
action_registry_js.notes: Pure internal registry pattern. No DOM manipulation with user content. localStorage stores action IDs only.

command_palette_js.feature: Ctrl+K command palette with fuzzy search over registered actions. Shows recent actions, categories, keyboard shortcut badges.
command_palette_js.innerHTML_detail: Line 42: static HTML kbd hint (no user data). Line 208: rendered action list — all interpolated values go through escapeHtml() (name, category, description, labels). Action IDs in data attributes are hardcoded internal strings.
command_palette_js.escapeHtml_note: Does not escape double quotes — same as other files. Safe here because action IDs in data-action-id attributes are hardcoded strings, never user-controlled.

keyboard_shortcuts_js.feature: Global keydown handler for all keyboard shortcuts. Customization panel with edit/reset/export/import. Print cheat sheet. Bindings stored in localStorage.
keyboard_shortcuts_js.innerHTML_detail: Line 139: static panel template. Line 228: action list with escapeHtml(). Lines 249/261/263: static capture prompts. All safe.
keyboard_shortcuts_js.document_write: Line 395: win.document.write(html) — writes to a new blank popup window for printing. All content escaped via escapeHtml(). Standard print pattern.
keyboard_shortcuts_js.import_validation: importShortcuts() validates typeof object. Values stored in localStorage go through escapeHtml() when rendered. No prototype pollution via JSON.parse.

app_js_rewrite.feature: Main app module rewritten — now imports action-registry, command-palette, keyboard-shortcuts. Registers builtin actions on init. Sets up command palette button.

crop_module_review.feature: TASK-047: Enhanced page crop tool with aspect ratio presets (A4/Letter/Square/16:9/custom), extended apply modes (all/current/even/odd/range), unit selector (pt/in/mm), numeric margin inputs, auto-trim whitespace margins, preview modal, undo integration via event bus, resize MediaBox option, rotated page handling.
crop_module_review.innerHTML_detail: Line 265: container.innerHTML='' (clearing). Line 946: static SVG + text for button reset (no user data interpolation).
crop_module_review.textContent_writes: yes (dimension display at line 582, page nav at line 626)
crop_module_review.input_validation: parseFloat for numeric margin inputs, parseInt for page ranges, parseFloat for custom aspect ratio with NaN checks, clamp() for all rect coordinates
crop_module_review.error_handling: try/catch with showToast for auto-trim and apply operations, validation before crop application (minimum size 50pt, non-zero cropping check)
crop_module_review.undo_integration: emits pages:save-undo before applying crop — same pattern as insert-pages.js

insert_pages_undo_fix_review.feature: Undo support added — insert-pages.js emits pages:save-undo, pages.js saves pre-insertion state (items + ArrayBuffer clone via .slice(0)), restores on undo with pdf.js reload.
insert_pages_undo_fix_review.memory_management: ArrayBuffer.slice(0) creates independent copy. History bounded at MAX_UNDO=30. Old entries shifted off. _skipPdfReady flag prevents recursive pdf:ready during restore.

jszip_min_js.purpose: ZIP file creation for split, convert, batch, bates, and extract-images module downloads

xlsx_full_min_js.purpose: XLSX export for table extraction module

docx_umd_js.purpose: DOCX generation for PDF-to-Word export module

qrcode_generator_min_js.purpose: QR code generation for qrbarcode module

jsqr_min_js.purpose: QR code scanning/verification for qrbarcode module

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this.
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot.
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed.
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.

merge.js, batch.js, hyperlinks.js, bates.js, command-palette.js, keyboard-shortcuts.js use escapeHtml() that does not escape double quotes. CSP script-src 'self' mitigates inline handler injection. In most files used in element content (safe). In attribute contexts (title/aria-label) should add escapeAttr().

hyperlinks.js: detected PDF link URLs not validated for protocol scheme. A malicious PDF could contain javascript: URIs in link annotations. CSP + noopener/noreferrer mitigate. Should add protocol allowlist (http/https/mailto) before window.open().
img2pdf.js image validation uses OR logic (MIME type OR extension) - slightly permissive but acceptable for client-side processing.
insert-pages.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
metadata.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
batch.js line 294: escapeHtml() used with textContent causes double-escaping — cosmetic display bug for filenames containing &, <, >.
keyboard-shortcuts.js line 395: document.write used on new popup window for print cheat sheet — acceptable pattern but noted for tracking.
notes: Security review completed — 82 checks passed, 0 fixes needed this run.

NEW: Reviewed 3 new JS modules + 1 rewrite (action-registry.js 373 lines, command-palette.js 267 lines, keyboard-shortcuts.js 406 lines, app.js 182 lines rewrite). All secure. These add command palette (Ctrl+K) and customizable keyboard shortcuts to the PDF editor.
command-palette.js: 2 innerHTML uses — static hint + escaped action list. Fuzzy search operates on internal registry data only.

keyboard-shortcuts.js: 5 innerHTML uses — all static templates or escaped via escapeHtml(). Import feature validates JSON structure. Export/import uses localStorage only. Print cheat sheet uses document.write on a new blank window (all content escaped).
action-registry.js: No innerHTML, no DOM manipulation with user content. Pure registry pattern with localStorage for recent actions.
app.js rewrite: Now imports new modules. Uses textContent for status bar. Uses validatePdf for file handling. No security regressions.
JS file count: 48 (up from 45 — 3 new files).
innerHTML count: 124 across 36 files (up from 117 across 34 — 7 new uses in 2 new files, all safe).
SSH: fail2ban total bans 5360 (+98 since last review). 9 IPs currently banned (up from 8). 7 currently failed attempts. Only authorized activity from novakj.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (76 days remaining).
All security headers confirmed in HTTP response. Nginx blocking rules verified.
recommendations: MEDIUM-LOW: Add protocol allowlist to hyperlinks.js handleLinkClick() — only allow http:, https:, mailto: schemes before calling window.open() on detected PDF links
LOW: Add escapeAttr() function to merge.js, batch.js, hyperlinks.js, bates.js, command-palette.js, keyboard-shortcuts.js for attribute contexts instead of escapeHtml()
LOW: Fix batch.js line 294 — use fileName directly with textContent instead of escapeHtml(fileName)
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove dead escapeHtml() function from insert-pages.js and metadata.js
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
